title: Implacable (disambiguation)
content:
'''Implacable''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Implacable (Acclamator-class)|'''''Implacable''''']], an [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship|''Acclamator''-class transgalactic military assault ship]].
*[[Implacable (Star Destroyer)|'''''Implacable''''']], a [[Star Destroyer]] [[Del Meeko]] served aboard.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Implacable (Acclamator-class)/Legends|'''''Implacable''''']], an [[Acclamator-class assault ship|''Acclamator''-class assault ship]].
*[[Implacable (Imperial-class)|'''''Implacable''''']], an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].
*[[Implacable (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|'''''Implacable''''']], a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]].
